physical_anchor: Tall, broad-shouldered young highlander with the heavy, unhurried frame of a wrestler-trained warrior; a dark-browed, clean-jawed face kept low, eyes habitually dropped toward his leader's hands, one palm resting constantly on the hilt of his dagger.
vocal_quality: Low chest-register baritone, slow-tempoed and physically grounded, clipped at the ends of phrases as if each word has been weighed before release.
social_presence: Occupies a room as a silent, watchful mass just behind his master — invisible until his leader is threatened, at which point his stillness reads as pure, contained menace.
